headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Xylem, Lowers Price Target to $160
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Mark Strouse   maintains Xylem (NYSE:XYL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $170 to $160.

headline: Equifax Set to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Know
summary: EFX gears up for the first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue growth expected across segments, but EPS is seen declining despite a solid mortgage-driven performance.
